ads.title: Brand introduction — Brandon Beck
primary_text:
Confluence Financial Partners invites you to an evening at J Alexander's in Naples.

Thursday, June 18 at 6:00 PM.

Join Brandon Beck, Wealth Manager, for a conversation designed to bring clarity to financial topics and considerations that may be relevant in today's environment.

Topics for the evening:
→ Planning considerations for your future
→ Aligning family through regular, structured meetings
→ Protecting wealth with a clear estate strategy
→ Economic trends and portfolio considerations
→ Giving with intention to reflect your values and long-term impact

Enjoy dinner and cocktails as our guest.

Confluence Wealth Services, Inc. d/b/a Confluence Financial Partners is an SEC-registered investment adviser. Registration of an investment adviser does not imply any level of skill or training. Please refer to our Form ADV Part 2A, Form CRS and the Investment Adviser Public Disclosure (IAPD) website at: www.adviserinfo.sec.gov  for further information regarding our investment services and their corresponding risks.

Are you thinking about the financial decisions that will shape the next chapter of your life?

Confluence Financial Partners is hosting an evening in Naples designed to explore the topics that may matter most: planning for your future to family alignment, estate strategy, economic trends and portfolio considerations, and intentional giving.

Join Brandon Beck, Wealth Manager, for dinner at J Alexander's on Thursday, June 18 at 6:00 PM.

Enjoy dinner and cocktails as our guest.

Confluence Wealth Services, Inc. d/b/a Confluence Financial Partners is an SEC-registered investment adviser. Registration of an investment adviser does not imply any level of skill or training. Please refer to our Form ADV Part 2A, Form CRS and the Investment Adviser Public Disclosure (IAPD) website at: www.adviserinfo.sec.gov  for further information regarding our investment services and their corresponding risks.

An evening in Naples designed for thoughtful conversation about your financial future.

Join Brandon Beck, Wealth Manager at Confluence Financial Partners, for dinner at J Alexander's with a small group of guests.

Thursday, June 18 at 6:00 PM.

The evening will explore planning considerations for your future, family alignment, estate strategy, economic trends and portfolio considerations, and giving with intention.

Enjoy dinner and cocktails as our guest.

Confluence Wealth Services, Inc. d/b/a Confluence Financial Partners is an SEC-registered investment adviser. Registration of an investment adviser does not imply any level of skill or training. Please refer to our Form ADV Part 2A, Form CRS and the Investment Adviser Public Disclosure (IAPD) website at: www.adviserinfo.sec.gov  for further information regarding our investment services and their corresponding risks.

ads.title: Personal invitation — Brandon Beck
primary_text:
Brandon Beck, Wealth Manager at Confluence Financial Partners, works with individuals and families navigating the intersection of financial planning, estate coordination, economic trends and portfolio considerations, and intentional giving.

He is hosting an evening in Naples to share perspectives on the decisions that may matter most at this stage of life.

Thursday, June 18 at 6:00 PM at J Alexander's.

An evening of thoughtful conversation over dinner and cocktails as our guest.

Confluence Wealth Services, Inc. d/b/a Confluence Financial Partners is an SEC-registered investment adviser. Registration of an investment adviser does not imply any level of skill or training. Please refer to our Form ADV Part 2A, Form CRS and the Investment Adviser Public Disclosure (IAPD) website at: www.adviserinfo.sec.gov  for further information regarding our investment services and their corresponding risks.

Meet Brandon Beck, Wealth Manager at Confluence Financial Partners.

Brandon works with families who are planning ahead, aligning around shared financial goals, and seeking clarity on how their decisions can work together.

He would like to invite you to an evening at J Alexander's in Naples.

Thursday, June 18 at 6:00 PM.
Enjoy dinner and cocktails as our guest.

We would value the opportunity to meet you.

Confluence Wealth Services, Inc. d/b/a Confluence Financial Partners is an SEC-registered investment adviser. Registration of an investment adviser does not imply any level of skill or training. Please refer to our Form ADV Part 2A, Form CRS and the Investment Adviser Public Disclosure (IAPD) website at: www.adviserinfo.sec.gov  for further information regarding our investment services and their corresponding risks.

When financial planning is approached thoughtfully, each decision can reinforce the ones around it. Your future planning, family alignment, estate strategy, economic trends and portfolio considerations, and giving intentions are connected, and the right conversation can help bring that into focus.

Join Brandon Beck, Wealth Manager at Confluence Financial Partners, for an evening in Naples to explore these connections.

Thursday, June 18 at 6:00 PM at J Alexander's.
Enjoy dinner and cocktails as our guest.

Confluence Wealth Services, Inc. d/b/a Confluence Financial Partners is an SEC-registered investment adviser. Registration of an investment adviser does not imply any level of skill or training. Please refer to our Form ADV Part 2A, Form CRS and the Investment Adviser Public Disclosure (IAPD) website at: www.adviserinfo.sec.gov  for further information regarding our investment services and their corresponding risks.

ads.title: For Naples Families
primary_text:
For families who call Southwest Florida home, the financial considerations of this stage of life deserve a thoughtful conversation in a setting designed for real connection.

Confluence Financial Partners is hosting an evening at J Alexander's in Naples for a small group of guests, designed to explore the topics that may matter most: planning for your future, aligning family through structured meetings, protecting wealth with a clear estate strategy, economic trends and portfolio considerations, and giving with intention.

Join Brandon Beck, Wealth Manager, for the evening.

Thursday, June 18 at 6:00 PM.
Enjoy dinner and cocktails as our guest.
A few seats remain.

Confluence Wealth Services, Inc. d/b/a Confluence Financial Partners is an SEC-registered investment adviser. Registration of an investment adviser does not imply any level of skill or training. Please refer to our Form ADV Part 2A, Form CRS and the Investment Adviser Public Disclosure (IAPD) website at: www.adviserinfo.sec.gov  for further information regarding our investment services and their corresponding risks.

An evening designed for real conversation, not a presentation.

Join Brandon Beck, Wealth Manager at Confluence Financial Partners, for an evening at J Alexander's in Naples with a small group of guests. The conversation will explore planning for your future, family alignment, estate strategy, economic trends and portfolio considerations, and intentional giving. Considerations worth exploring in person.

Thursday, June 18 at 6:00 PM.
Enjoy dinner and cocktails as our guest.
A few seats remain.

Confluence Wealth Services, Inc. d/b/a Confluence Financial Partners is an SEC-registered investment adviser. Registration of an investment adviser does not imply any level of skill or training. Please refer to our Form ADV Part 2A, Form CRS and the Investment Adviser Public Disclosure (IAPD) website at: www.adviserinfo.sec.gov  for further information regarding our investment services and their corresponding risks.

For those in Southwest Florida, an evening at J Alexander's in Naples offers the opportunity to explore how planning for your future, family alignment, estate strategy, economic trends and portfolio considerations, and intentional giving can work together in a setting designed for real conversation.

Join Brandon Beck, Wealth Manager, on Thursday, June 18 at 6:00 PM.

ads.title: Naples setting + topics
primary_text:
Your future planning, your family's alignment, your estate strategy, economic trends and portfolio considerations, and your approach to giving all influence each other, but they are often addressed in separate conversations.

Join Brandon Beck, Wealth Manager at Confluence Financial Partners, for an evening in Naples to explore how these areas can work together.

Thursday, June 18 at 6:00 PM at J Alexander's.

The evening will cover:
→ Planning considerations for your future
→ Aligning family through regular, structured meetings
→ Protecting wealth with a clear estate strategy
→ Economic trends and portfolio considerations
→ Giving with intention to reflect your values and long-term impact

Enjoy dinner and cocktails as our guest.

Confluence Wealth Services, Inc. d/b/a Confluence Financial Partners is an SEC-registered investment adviser. Registration of an investment adviser does not imply any level of skill or training. Please refer to our Form ADV Part 2A, Form CRS and the Investment Adviser Public Disclosure (IAPD) website at: www.adviserinfo.sec.gov  for further information regarding our investment services and their corresponding risks.

What does your financial plan look like when all the pieces are considered together?

Join Brandon Beck, Wealth Manager, for an evening at J Alexander's in Naples designed to explore the connections between your future planning, family alignment, estate strategy, economic trends and portfolio considerations, and intentional giving.

Thursday, June 18 at 6:00 PM.

Enjoy dinner and cocktails as our guest.

Confluence Wealth Services, Inc. d/b/a Confluence Financial Partners is an SEC-registered investment adviser. Registration of an investment adviser does not imply any level of skill or training. Please refer to our Form ADV Part 2A, Form CRS and the Investment Adviser Public Disclosure (IAPD) website at: www.adviserinfo.sec.gov  for further information regarding our investment services and their corresponding risks.

Whether you are thinking about planning for your future, aligning family through regular meetings, protecting wealth with a clear estate strategy, economic trends and portfolio considerations, or giving with intention. Each of these areas deserves thoughtful attention, and each one interacts with the others.

An evening at J Alexander's in Naples is designed to bring them together.

Join Brandon Beck, Wealth Manager at Confluence Financial Partners, as he explores these connections.

Thursday, June 18 at 6:00 PM.
Enjoy dinner and cocktails as our guest.

Confluence Wealth Services, Inc. d/b/a Confluence Financial Partners is an SEC-registered investment adviser. Registration of an investment adviser does not imply any level of skill or training. Please refer to our Form ADV Part 2A, Form CRS and the Investment Adviser Public Disclosure (IAPD) website at: www.adviserinfo.sec.gov  for further information regarding our investment services and their corresponding risks.

ads.title: Advisor perspective — Brandon Beck
primary_text:
Your future planning, family alignment, estate strategy, economic trends and portfolio considerations, and giving intentions each carry weight on their own. But the real clarity often comes from how they work together, especially as your circumstances evolve.

Are you having the kinds of conversations that bring clarity to the generations that follow?

Join Brandon Beck, Wealth Manager, for a conversation designed to bring clarity to financial topics and considerations that may be relevant in today's environment. An evening in Naples exploring how coordination across these areas can help bring confidence to the decisions ahead.

Thursday, June 18 at 6:00 PM at J Alexander's.
Enjoy dinner and cocktails as our guest.
A few seats remain.

Confluence Wealth Services, Inc. d/b/a Confluence Financial Partners is an SEC-registered investment adviser. Registration of an investment adviser does not imply any level of skill or training. Please refer to our Form ADV Part 2A, Form CRS and the Investment Adviser Public Disclosure (IAPD) website at: www.adviserinfo.sec.gov  for further information regarding our investment services and their corresponding risks.

The decisions you make about your financial future, your family's alignment, your estate strategy, economic trends and portfolio considerations, and your approach to giving can shape your legacy. Each area deserves thoughtful attention, and they are more connected than they may appear.

Join Brandon Beck, Wealth Manager at Confluence Financial Partners, for an evening in Naples to explore how thoughtful coordination across these areas can help strengthen your overall plan.

Thursday, June 18 at 6:00 PM at J Alexander's.
Enjoy dinner and cocktails as our guest.
A few seats remain.

Confluence Wealth Services, Inc. d/b/a Confluence Financial Partners is an SEC-registered investment adviser. Registration of an investment adviser does not imply any level of skill or training. Please refer to our Form ADV Part 2A, Form CRS and the Investment Adviser Public Disclosure (IAPD) website at: www.adviserinfo.sec.gov  for further information regarding our investment services and their corresponding risks.

A well-coordinated financial plan considers more than any single piece in isolation. When your future planning, family alignment, estate strategy, economic trends and portfolio considerations, and intentional giving work together, each decision can carry more purpose.

Join Brandon Beck, Wealth Manager at Confluence Financial Partners, for a dinner in Naples focused on these connections.

Thursday, June 18 at 6:00 PM at J Alexander's.
Enjoy dinner and cocktails as our guest.
A few seats remain.

Confluence Wealth Services, Inc. d/b/a Confluence Financial Partners is an SEC-registered investment adviser. Registration of an investment adviser does not imply any level of skill or training. **Photo direction:** NOT the text-on-navy approach from Pittsburgh Ads 8/9. Use a personal background similar to Ad 2's approach — an evening table setting that makes the viewer picture themselves at the dinner. Think: intimate private dining room, warm candlelight, place settings ready for guests, dark wood, amber tones. The photo should feel like the empty chair is waiting for them.

**J Alexander's interior reference:** Dark wood paneling, warm lighting, white tablecloths, leather booth seating. The photo should feel like J Alexander's itself — or at minimum, the same tier of upscale casual American dining.

**Changes from Pittsburgh:** Two ads → one. Text-on-navy → photo background. Same urgency copy. Gold accent retained for CTA.
